song.title: We Crown You
song.lyrics:
Intro .A C#m B E
.A C#m B
Verse 1 . A C#m B To the One who wore a crown of thorns . A C#m B To the One who took the lash and scourge . A C#m B For the hands and feet that were pierced by nails . A C#m B For the sacri - fice that has torn the veil
Chorus 2x . A E We crown You, we fall face down and we worship, we all cry out . C#m B B You are worthy God, You are worthy, God
Interlude 1 .A C#m B E
.A C#m B
Verse 2 . E/G # E A C#m E To the One who gave His very life a - way . A C#m B Who took upon Him - self, all our guilt and shame . E G # A C#m B Hanging on a cross for the world He loved . E A C#m B With His pre - cious blood, purchased men for God
Interlude 2 .A C#m A B
Bridge 1 . A To the One who endured all the shame of the cross . C#m To the Lamb who was slain as atonement for us . A B To the Son who overcame all the power of death we praise
Bridge 2 . A For the stripes, for the wounds, for the beating You bore . C#m For the tears, for the blood that was willingly poured . A B For the merciful, wonderful, majesty of Your love Transition .E
End .A
